# Execution Ledger

- Stage: Research
  Executor: Researcher
  Output: research1.md
  Delegation status: delegated and completed
  Note: Focused repository and domain investigation completed by subagent.

- Stage: Planning
  Executor: Planner
  Output: plan.md
  Delegation status: delegated and completed
  Note: Plan synthesized from research artifacts.

- Stage: Coding
  Executor: Leader
  Output: none
  Delegation status: handled directly by leader
  Note: No implementation work was performed in this turn.

- Stage: Review
  Executor: Reviewer
  Output: review.md
  Delegation status: delegated but no usable result returned
  Note: Review was requested but did not produce an artifact yet.
